title: Tax customizations
excerpt: Learn how to customize tax behavior using Stripe Tax. Set up Stripe Tax to fit your business needs with tax customizations. Create rules that apply to a product tax code in any supported location. - Change the [Software as a service (SaaS) - personal use](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/tax-codes.md?tax_code=txcd_10103000) tax code from taxable to non-taxable in Louisiana to reflect the uncertainty of how SaaS might be taxed. - Apply a 5% tax rate to the [Newspapers](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/tax-codes.md?tax_code=txcd_35020100%09) tax code in Poland, instead of the applied rate of 8%, to reflect that your product is a regional newspaper and not a national one.…
